description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: Legendary Wukong Clan, no Controlled and Measured feat, and you must take this feat between levels 1 and 4. If you are level 5+, you cannot take this feat.
You were raised to love and protect, despite it going against your very nature, you don't want to be a rampaging monster. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Strength or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You may designate a number of creatures who you truly love and care for equal to half your proficency bonus as your Loved Ones. While you have any ranks of the Berserk condition or are under the effects of Wrathful Form, a Loved One may spend an action to attempt a Persausion check against a DC equal to 16 + the number of Berserk ranks you have. On a success, your Berserk ends and you leave Wrathful Form. Once you select a Loved One, you are unable to select a new one even if they were to die.
  • You gain a new item known as your Cherished Object. Once per short rest, as a free action you may look at your Cherished Object and clear yourself of all ranks of Demoralized and Charmed as you are brought back to reality. Alternatively, if a Loved One has your Cherished Object, they instead gain advantage on the Persausion check to calm you down.
  • If you ever see a Loved One die you go into a mad fury. You instantly gain maximum ranks of Berserk and enter into Wrathful Form even if you have no more uses of said transformation. Alternatively, if you know a Loved One died and you know who did it, the moment you see the one who killed your Loved One you will gain the same effects as if you were there when they died. While you are Berserking, you are unable to target any creatures besides the one who killed your Loved One or anyone who tries to stop you from doing so. You are unable to have these ranks of Berserk go away via any means except by rampaging for 5 minutes straight or by killing the one who killed your Loved One.
